articles.title: American Battery Factory secures 4.5GWh offtake agreements for Arizona LFP gigafactory（美國）
keyPoints: ABF在亞利桑那州皮馬縣的工廠前五年產能為5.5GWh，計劃擴至15GWh
採用LFP鋰離子電池技術，號稱最安全且環保的設計，壽命可達10,000次循環或超過20年
工廠預計2027年底開始生產，2028年達到5.5GWh滿產能
使用Sprung Structures的快速部署工廠，建設成本比傳統方式低33-50%
已簽署4.5GWh的包銷協議，供應商包括Wuxi-LEAD、Honeywell、First Phosphate等
在中國設有試生產線，通過子公司ABF-Asia積累生產經驗
articles.originalContent: The production facility in Pima County, AZ, will have a 5.5GWh output for the first five years of production. ABF plans to continue scaling up the facility, which will also house its R&D centre and headquarters, to 15GWh. Production at the Arizona gigafactory is expected to begin in late 2027, with full 5.5GWh capacity expected the following year.

articles.title: Belgium IPP Storm raises €330 million, starts building 1.2GWh battery storage projects（比利時）
keyPoints: 比利時開發商Storm獲得3.3億歐元項目融資，興建兩個大型BESS項目
Ruien項目：200MW/800MWh，位於前燃煤電廠舊址，預計2027年秋季調試
Langerlo項目：100MW/400MWh，預計2027年夏季調試
特斯拉提供BESS設備，採用Megapack 3和Megablock最新技術
投資方包括I4B、PMV、TINC及銀行財團（Belfius、ING、KBC、Rabobank等）
這標誌著Storm從風電向儲能領域的戰略擴展
articles.originalContent: Renewables developer and IPP Storm has secured project finance for two large-scale BESS projects in Ruien and Langerlo, Belgium. Storm, investors I4B (The Belgian Infrastructure Fund), PMV, TINC and a banking syndicate are collectively investing €330 million in the two battery energy storage system (BESS) projects, which total 300MW/1,200MWh of capacity.

articles.title: Waaree to build US$415 million solar glass plant in India（印度）
keyPoints: 印度太陽能製造商Waaree投資4.15億美元興建太陽能玻璃廠
年產能達2,500噸/日，由全資子公司Waaree Green Glass運營
同時將Kotsons持股從64.04%增至75.10%，斥資約190億盧比
Kotsons已更名為Waaree Transpower Private Limited
這是Waaree 2.0戰略的一部分，鞏固太陽能價值鏈整合
目前在印度拥有22.3GW太陽能模組產能和5.4GW電池產能
articles.originalContent: Indian solar PV manufacturer Waaree Energies is developing a INR39 billion (US$415 million) solar glass manufacturing facility in India. The solar glass plant will operate under Waaree Energies' wholly owned subsidiary, Waaree Green Glass, and is expected to achieve a production capacity of 2,500 tons per day (TPD).

articles.title: CSIRO's thermal-sensing robots detect solar module faults in landmark Australian trial（澳洲）
keyPoints: 澳洲國家科學機構CSIRO成功完成自動機器人試驗，革新大型太陽能電廠維護
機器人配備LiDAR、RGB相機和熱紅外相機，可檢測電氣故障和熱異常
可檢測粉塵積聚、物理損壞、鬆動零件和關鍵電氣熱點等維護問題
專為500MW以上大型太陽能電廠設計，解決人工巡檢的艱鉅任務
自動編目維護需求並為每個檢測週期創建全面的數據記錄
CSIRO正在積極尋求行業合作夥伴以加速商業部署
articles.originalContent: Australia's national science agency, CSIRO, has successfully completed trials of autonomous robots designed to revolutionise maintenance operations at large-scale solar installations. The technology represents an advancement in addressing the labour-intensive and hazardous nature of manual solar PV power plant maintenance.

articles.title: Poland's ELQ to invest €2.5 billion in Ukraine solar and energy storage（烏克蘭）
keyPoints: 波蘭太陽能開發商ELQ計劃投資25億歐元在烏克蘭建設太陽能和儲能項目
目標在烏克蘭建設2.5GW可再生能源產能，預計今年開始
目前有9個項目在建或開發中，另有10個項目在考慮中，總計1.1GW
CEO表示：我們不會等到戰爭結束，烏克蘭急需新的能源來源
投資結構：ELQ持股10%，國際機構60%，其他私人投資者30%
世界銀行估計烏克蘭能源部門重建成本約910億美元
articles.originalContent: Polish solar developer and investment platform ELQ plans to invest up to €2.5 billion (US$2.9 billion) to build solar PV and energy storage projects in Ukraine. According to Polish media reports and comments from the firm's CEO, ELQ plans to build 2.5GW of renewable energy capacity in Ukraine starting this year, primarily solar and energy storage capacity.
